zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Lovell II於大約1222年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，他的父親John Lovell31歲，母親Katherine de Bassett37歲。他於1244年與Maud Sydenham在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年9月27日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Lovell II于大约1222年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，他的父亲John Lovell31岁，母亲Katherine de Bassett37岁。他于1244年与Maud Sydenham在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1287年9月27日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Lovell II was born about 1222, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Lovell, was 31 and his mother, Katherine de Bassett, was 37. He married Maud Sydenham in 1244, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 September 1287, in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Lovell II est né environ 1222, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lovell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Bassett, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Maud Sydenham en 1244, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 septembre 1287, à Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Lovell II um 1222 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lovell 31 und seine Mutter Katherine de Bassett 37. Er hat 1244 in Oxfordshire, England Maud Sydenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. September 1287 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lovell II è nato il circa 1222 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Lovell, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Bassett, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Maud Sydenham nel 1244, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 settembre 1287, nel Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Lovell IIが約1222年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Lovellは31歳，母Katherine de Bassettは37歳であった。1244年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでMaud Sydenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年9月27日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプストンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Lovell II(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lovell(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Bassett(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1244년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Maud Sydenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 9월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스라프스턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lovell II nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Lovell, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Bassett, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Sydenham em 1244, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1287, em Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Lovell II родился около 1222 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Lovell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Bassett, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Sydenham в 1244 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 сентября 1287 г. в местности трапстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Lovell II nació aproximadamente 1222, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Lovell, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Katherine de Bassett, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Maud Sydenham en 1244, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1287, en Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
